about.title: About Our Company
about.subtitle: ELCAR specializes in importing Electric Vehicles, all types of Electric Charging Stations, Connectors and Accessories, and other Electric Devices from China to Azerbaijan at the most affordable prices.
about.section1: Our company was founded in 2022 in Baku, Azerbaijan, and is engaged in the sale of charging devices for electric vehicles as well as the import and sale of electric vehicles. We believe that transitioning to electric vehicles is one of the most important steps in today's modern world, and we are committed to providing our customers with the best solutions to support and charge their vehicles.
about.section2: To help our customers choose the most suitable option for their needs, we proudly offer a wide range of electric vehicles from various brands and models. Our team consists of experienced specialists who will assist you in the selection process and answer any questions related to electric transportation.
about.section3: We are confident that our experience and professionalism allow us to provide the best service in the sales and maintenance of electric vehicles. Thank you for choosing our company as your partner in electric vehicles and related services.
